channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Drug Safety & Pharmacovigilance
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Drug Safety & Pharmacovigilance

item.title: Microbial metabolites at the front line: Orchestrating gastrointestinal and systemic barrier immunity across the lifespan.
item.description: Cell reports - Review - Microbiota-derived metabolites are central mediators between commensal microbes and host immune system at mucosal barrier surfaces. Insights from mouse models have revealed precise molecular mechan...

item.title: Design, synthesis, and biological evaluation of C-28 carboxyl derivatives of Hederacoside C as anti-inflammatory agents for acute lung injury.
item.description: Bioorganic chemistry - Hederacoside C, a bioactive triterpenoid saponin isolated from the dried roots of the Ranunculaceae plant Pulsatilla chinensis, has demonstrated therapeutic efficacy in murine models of nephritis, ...

item.title: Chinese Medicine Enemas for Ulcerative Colitis: Mechanisms and Optimal Duration from a Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
item.description: Journal of visualized experiments : JoVE - Meta-analysis - This systematic review and meta-analysis aimed to elucidate the mechanisms underlying the efficacy of Chinese medicine enema formulations in animal models of ulcerative colitis (UC) and to provide ...
